creator: pixel@copei.de
text:
Building sbcl-1.0.16-1 fails with the following output:

; SYS:CONTRIB;SB-SPROF;SB-SPROF.FASL.NEWEST written

WARNING! Some of the contrib modules did not build successfully or pass
their self-tests. Failed contribs:"

  sb-aclrepl
  sb-bsd-sockets
  sb-cltl2
  sb-cover
  sb-grovel
  sb-md5
  sb-posix
  sb-rotate-byte
  sb-rt
  sb-simple-streams

*** Error code 1
